subcodes.first_line: The Peerless Friend proclaimeth: O friends! Purify yourselves from the defilements of the contingent world, that ye may attain unto repose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست یکتا میفرماید ای دوستان از آلایش امکان خود را طاهر نمائید تا باسایش
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love as fire
